---
title: "Welcome"
---

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) as a **book** project. Use the table of contents to open the Linux installation guide.

Download the compiled book as a single PDF: [team-teaching-material.pdf](team-teaching-material.pdf).

For other materials in this repository (SNF, Git, package development, etc.), see the project `README.md` in the repository root.
